conbody.p: Overview: As a CDS, I need a CDS Activity dashboard so that I can view the review activities performed and analyze my productivity.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDS General CDS Monthly Productivity .

The report displays the following:
KPI cards: Initial Reviews Per Day, Additional Reviews Per Day, Total Reviews Per Day
CDS Activity Tabular Chart

ul.li: This chart displays the data for the activity performed by the CDS in the last 1 week.
The user can click the Reset button to reset the dates to last 10 days of activity.
The chart displays review activity for every 'Initiating' CDS in the selected date range. Initiating CDS associated with the clarification.
Column headers in the chart display the Activity Dates (Last 7 days).
Row headers in the chart display the metrics along with the CDS Name.
The data in the chart is sorted alphabetically based on CDS.

conbody.p: On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in charts.
For filters on all pages, refer .
Exclude Weekend Activity: When you select this check box, the activities performed on a weekend by the CDS does not appear in the report. This check box is not selected by default.

entry.p: Displays the average daily initial reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range.

Initial Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial Reviews with the Initial Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range). Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Example: For last 1 week Activity date, this metric displays the average daily initial reviews by the CDS.
Note:
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the average daily additional reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range.

Additional Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Additional Reviews with the additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range). Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: For last 1 week Activity date, this metric displays out of the total number of days CDS's worked, the count of additional reviews done.
Note:
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.
Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the daily total reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range

Total Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial and Additional Reviews with the Initial Review Date and additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range). Rounded to 0 decimal places
Note:
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.
Initial and Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

table.title: CDS Activity Table Column and Description

entry.p: Displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the count of additional reviews performed in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Additional Review Types:

ul.li: Clarification creation
Clarification modification
Working review modification
Worksheet creation or modification
Possible review creation
Possible review modification
Reconciliation assessment creation
Reconciliation assessment modification
Encounter Saved
Note creation or modification
Tracking Codes Addition or Modification
Encounter status modification

entry.p: Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Review' is not considered in the Additional Reviews calculation.
Displays the count of total reviews performed in the selected activity date range.
Total Reviews = (Initial Reviews + Additional Reviews).
NOTE:
Review Date/Time (Initial Review and Additional Review dates) falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the count of encounters with at least one clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range.

Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range./ Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range.) *100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%
NOTE:
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the count of clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Displays the count of clarifications with at least one instance responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Overall Clarifications Responded_
Includes
NotFinal
Displays the percentage of clarifications responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.

Clarification Response Rate= (The count of clarifications with at least one instance responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 80%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Overall Clarification Response Rate_Includes
NotFinal
This column displays the count of clarifications agreed against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Overall Clarifications Agreed_Includes
NotFinal
Displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.

Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Clarifications agreed against the clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range)/ The count of clarifications with at-least one instance responded against the clarification instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Overall Clarification Agreed Rate_Includes
NotFinal
Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the percentage of reviewed Encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range. / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range.) X 100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of Financial Impact clarification with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

%Financial Impact Clarification = (The count of Financial Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of sent Financial Impact clarifications responded against the Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of Financial Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed against the Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the percentage of responded Financial Impact clarifications agreed against the Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed against the Financial Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Financial Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed Rate_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one quality Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one quality Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the count of Quality Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

% Quality Clarification = (The count of Quality Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Quality Impact Clarifications Responded
_IncludesNotFinal
Displays the percentage of sent Quality Impact clarifications responded against the Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Quality Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of Quality Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality ’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Quality Impact Clarification Response Rate_
IncludesNotFinal
his column displays the count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed against the Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality ’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the percentage of responded Quality Impact clarifications agreed against the Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Quality Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed against the Quality Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Quality Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality ’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Quality Impact Clarification Agreed Rate_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the count of Both Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

% Both Impact Clarification = (The count of Both Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of sent Both Impact clarifications responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Both Impact Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of Both Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of responded Both Impact clarifications agreed against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

Both Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed against the Both Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the percentage of reviewed Encounters with SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

SEV Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range. / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range.) X 100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Initial Review Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations
Displays the count of SEV Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

% SEV Clarification = (The count of SEV Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%.
NOTE:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
SEV Impact Clarifications Responded_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the percentage of sent SEV Impact clarifications responded against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

SEV Clarification Response Rate= (The count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of SEV Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
SEV Impact Clarification Response Rate_
IncludesNotFinal
Displays the count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of responded SEV Impact clarifications agreed against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.

SEV Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%
NOTE:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
SEV Impact Clarification Agreed Rate_
IncludesNotFinal

ul.li: The filter displays the activity date range for the last 7 days.
Format: Between Date range, example: 9/2/2022 - 9/9/2022.
Default: Last 7 days activity selected by default.

row.entry: Allows the user to reset the activity date to last 10 days of activity.

ul.li: This filter displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that the CDS user has access to.
User can select multiple facilities
Users can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
This filter displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities user has access to.
User can select multiple payers
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
Users can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays the name of a logged in CDS only. Only a logged in user can have access to their own report.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
This filter displays the list of available units.
User can select multiple Units.
Users can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
This filter displays the list of available Admit Services.
User can select multiple Admit Services.
Users can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
This filter displays the list of available Visit Types.
User can select multiple Visit Types.
Users can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
This filter displays the available options for Weekend Only Stay- Y and N
User can select more than one option.
Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before Sunday, 11.59 PM)

row.entry: (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range/ Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range) X 100. E.g. 33%.

Provider Response Rate = (Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine/Count of Clarifications Sent) x100. E.g. 90%.

(Count of Clarifications with at least one agreed response in the selected activity date range /Count of clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 90%.
Financial Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification (excludes REMOVED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 56% .

(Count of Financial Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range.)x100. E.g. 75%.

Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 75%.

(Count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/ Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 90%.
Quality Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification (excludes REMOVED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 56%.

(Count of Quality Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range.)x100. E.g. 44%.

(Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 88%.

(Count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 100%.
Both Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of Both Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range.)x100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 91%.

(Count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 95%.
SEV Clarifications: Clarifications with ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification (excludes REMOVED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of SEV Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 21%.

(Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 70%

(Count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range /Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 98%.
